title: Eugene's Iron Knight Armor
description: Cartoon-style iron knight armor, make it medieval while keeping it vanilla.
body:
This is originally for modpack [AnimateCraft: Lankeren](https://modrinth.com/modpack/animatecraft-lankeren). If you like this content, I'm sure you'll like that modpack, too. Welcome to check it out!  

---
Just a small texture pack about iron armor. Tried to make it medieval while keeping the most vanilla feeling.
![image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UpFbBUyj/images/5388c0fa267b7f7a6b476b9477a2619726f1358a.png)
